content.scenarioHint: 你在社交活动中认识了一位新朋友，想加对方的社交媒体账号以便保持联系

options.text: What's your Instagram handle? I'd love to follow you.
Can you send me your phone number so I can add you on WeChat?
Do you have a social media account? I'm not sure which one.
Why don't you post more on TikTok? I saw your last video.

content.explanation: 正确答案直接、礼貌地询问对方的Instagram账号，符合社交场景中的常见表达。选项2转向了微信（非全球通用平台）且未明确语境；选项3表达模糊，缺乏针对性；选项4是批评性评论，不符合主动询问账号的交际目的。

options.text: It's @jenny_adventures. I post travel photos there!
I'm not sure—I think it's something with 'jenny'.
Can you send me a friend request on Facebook?

content.explanation: 正确答案明确提供了Instagram用户名格式（@handle）并补充了内容类型，增强互动。选项2模糊不清，缺乏专业性。选项3转移平台但未回答问题，不符合直接回应要求。选项4提供邮箱，与社交媒体账号无关。
content.speakerText: Hey, I saw your post on Instagram—what's your username?
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿，我看到你在Instagram上的帖子了，你的用户名是什么？
